user_query: I am a small business owner looking to improve my website's SEO. Please analyze the keyword density for my product page by extracting the top 15 keywords and phrases, sorted by density. The URL is 'https://www.example.com/products'. Additionally, fetch the sitemap XML as JSON for 'example.com' and include the breadcrumbs in the response.

TaskList.description: Fetch the content of the product page at the specified URL to analyze keyword density.
Analyze the keyword density from the fetched content and extract the top 15 keywords and phrases sorted by density.
Fetch the sitemap XML for the domain 'example.com' and convert it to JSON format.
Extract the breadcrumbs from the sitemap JSON obtained from step 3.
